!== RecurDyn V9R5 x64 (9.5.36410.0.9509) ==
!
!
!=================== MODEL DATA FILE GENERATED BY RECURDYN MODELER ====================
!
!====================================== Ground ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ground'
PART / 1 , GROUND
, NAME = 'Ground'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='InertiaMarker'
MARKER / 1
, NAME = 'Ground.InertiaMarker'
, PART = 1
, QP = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0D , 0D , 0D
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 2
, NAME = 'Ground.Marker1'
, PART = 1
, QP = 0.000755125383641255 , -0.0275851020684613 , 0.0825102884477394
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!====================================== DummyBody@WOR========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='MotherBody'


!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_motor'
PART / 3
, NAME = 'q1_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.310920544425175
, CM = 4
, IP = 7.1794369594646e-05 , 7.0766413861297e-05 , 7.19031471880574e-05
, 1.33059061364678e-09 , -4.79515307703144e-09 , -3.0268794320383e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 4
, NAME = 'q1_motor.CM'
, PART = 3
, QP = 1.30706577694355e-06 , -0.0159771065881619 , 0.139970266357842
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_act'
MARKER / 5
, NAME = 'q1_motor.q1_act'
, PART = 3
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 6
, NAME = 'q1_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 3
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body1'
PART / 4
, NAME = 'body1'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 10.0123496865811
, CM = 7
, IP = 0.0829601614566715 , 0.0391199810914461 , 0.0649458588226152
, -0.000328089653994623 , -0.000119428008908532 , 2.09012210735718e-06
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 7
, NAME = 'body1.CM'
, PART = 4
, QP = -0.00263359756766053 , 0.0911172596849167 , 1.68446101733395e-05
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 8
, NAME = 'body1.Ai'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 9
, NAME = 'body1.Cij'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 10
, NAME = 'body1.Marker1'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 11
, NAME = 'body1.Marker2'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker3'
MARKER / 12
, NAME = 'body1.Marker3'
, PART = 4
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='base'
PART / 5
, NAME = 'base'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 21.3112081746921
, CM = 13
, IP = 0.366189232131684 , 0.47648377471474 , 0.199885735500912
, -0.000976077048043456 , -0.000992843194472926 , -0.0524376459974293
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 13
, NAME = 'base.CM'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.000755125383641255 , -0.0275851020684613 , 0.0825102884477394
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 14
, NAME = 'base.Marker1'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.000755125383641255 , -0.0275851020684613 , 0.0825102884477394
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='origin'
MARKER / 15
, NAME = 'base.origin'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 16
, NAME = 'base.Cij'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 17
, NAME = 'base.Marker2'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker3'
MARKER / 18
, NAME = 'base.Marker3'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker4'
MARKER / 19
, NAME = 'base.Marker4'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.14
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker5'
MARKER / 20
, NAME = 'base.Marker5'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker6'
MARKER / 21
, NAME = 'base.Marker6'
, PART = 5
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker7'
MARKER / 22
, NAME = 'base.Marker7'
, PART = 5
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_motor'
PART / 6
, NAME = 'q4_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.884391525024331
, CM = 23
, IP = 0.000626904101201552 , 0.000369503570594572 , 0.000626761409100112
, -2.68730458352427e-07 , 1.50873278614851e-07 , 2.46466352778066e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 23
, NAME = 'q4_motor.CM'
, PART = 6
, QP = -0.0750012803930522 , -0.040213876633073 , 0.249999840922683
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_act'
MARKER / 24
, NAME = 'q4_motor.q4_act'
, PART = 6
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 25
, NAME = 'q4_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 6
, QP = -0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_motor'
PART / 7
, NAME = 'q3_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.884391560415185
, CM = 26
, IP = 0.000626904669398412 , 0.000369503589366627 , 0.000626760901801409
, -2.68850693452433e-07 , 1.50735976598285e-07 , 2.45666335727317e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 26
, NAME = 'q3_motor.CM'
, PART = 7
, QP = 0.0749987145554728 , -0.0402138776139038 , 0.249999837368259
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_act'
MARKER / 27
, NAME = 'q3_motor.q3_act'
, PART = 7
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 28
, NAME = 'q3_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 7
, QP = 0.075 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_motor'
PART / 8
, NAME = 'q2_motor'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 0.884391667056809
, CM = 29
, IP = 0.000627164195872035 , 0.000369503675690764 , 0.000626501484694499
, -1.69589104496958e-07 , -1.84627469749079e-07 , 7.65046555909882e-08
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 29
, NAME = 'q2_motor.CM'
, PART = 8
, QP = -1.8884963639523e-07 , -0.0402138792565474 , 0.250001252493125
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_act'
MARKER / 30
, NAME = 'q2_motor.q2_act'
, PART = 8
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 31
, NAME = 'q2_motor.Marker1'
, PART = 8
, QP = 0 , -0.02 , 0.25
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 1.5707963267949
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body2'
PART / 9
, NAME = 'body2'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 10.4391437674567
, CM = 32
, IP = 0.0780970193464117 , 0.0255871855807303 , 0.0745746466344453
, 3.53131298101708e-05 , -8.81620777833472e-06 , 0.00547282289489732
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 32
, NAME = 'body2.CM'
, PART = 9
, QP = -6.9055875137089e-05 , 0.285154800614441 , -0.00686210917143882
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 33
, NAME = 'body2.Ai'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 34
, NAME = 'body2.Cij'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 35
, NAME = 'body2.Marker1'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.2 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 36
, NAME = 'body2.Marker2'
, PART = 9
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body3'
PART / 10
, NAME = 'body3'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 10.3406497234359
, CM = 37
, IP = 0.0792872354716476 , 0.0227404242493157 , 0.0781409250910383
, 8.26042768438978e-06 , 5.43833216931251e-06 , 0.00431986606376804
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 37
, NAME = 'body3.CM'
, PART = 10
, QP = 3.20036133789324e-05 , 0.526906923463317 , -0.00548573987108039
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 38
, NAME = 'body3.Ai'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 39
, NAME = 'body3.Cij'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 40
, NAME = 'body3.Marker1'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.43 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 41
, NAME = 'body3.Marker2'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker3'
MARKER / 42
, NAME = 'body3.Marker3'
, PART = 10
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = -1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Body ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='body4'
PART / 11
, NAME = 'body4'
, TYPEENTITY = GENERAL
, MASS = 7.01416597186014
, CM = 43
, IP = 0.0393493190184971 , 0.0111764686166838 , 0.0410218257620852
, -0.000926169916890393 , -8.43406506016272e-06 , 0.000204330936352529
, QG = 0 , 0 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='CM'
MARKER / 43
, NAME = 'body4.CM'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0.00443191774292435 , 0.727588384009872 , -0.000679201979870376
, REULER = 0 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Ai'
MARKER / 44
, NAME = 'body4.Ai'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 0 , 1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Cij'
MARKER / 45
, NAME = 'body4.Cij'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.84 , 0
, REULER = 3.14159265358979 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker1'
MARKER / 46
, NAME = 'body4.Marker1'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = 1.5707963267949 , 0 , 0
 
 
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Marker2'
MARKER / 47
, NAME = 'body4.Marker2'
, PART = 11
, QP = 0 , 0.66 , 0
, REULER = -1.5707963267949 , 3.14159265358979 , 0
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Fixed1'
JOINT / 1
, NAME = 'Fixed1'
, I = 14
, J = 2
, Fixed
, EXCLUDE_VBODY = FALSE
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev2'
JOINT / 2
, NAME = 'Rev2'
, I = 35
, J = 11
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev3'
JOINT / 3
, NAME = 'Rev3'
, I = 40
, J = 36
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev1'
JOINT / 4
, NAME = 'Rev1'
, I = 12
, J = 18
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Rev4'
JOINT / 5
, NAME = 'Rev4'
, I = 47
, J = 42
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act1'
JOINT / 6
, NAME = 'Act1'
, I = 6
, J = 19
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 11
, NAME = 'Act1.RMotion'
, JOINT = 6
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*3\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act2'
JOINT / 7
, NAME = 'Act2'
, I = 31
, J = 20
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 13
, NAME = 'Act2.RMotion'
, JOINT = 7
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act3'
JOINT / 8
, NAME = 'Act3'
, I = 28
, J = 21
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 15
, NAME = 'Act3.RMotion'
, JOINT = 8
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.5\
 
 
!======================================== Joint ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Act4'
JOINT / 9
, NAME = 'Act4'
, I = 25
, J = 22
, Revolute
 
 
!======================================== Motion ========================================
!
MOTION / 17
, NAME = 'Act4.RMotion'
, JOINT = 9
, ROTATION 
, DISPLACEMENT 
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.5\
 
 
!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler1'
COUPLER/1
, NAME = 'Coupler1'
, JOINTS = 6, 4
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 32., -60.


!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler2'
COUPLER/2
, NAME = 'Coupler2'
, JOINTS = 7, 2
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 360., -54.


!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler3'
COUPLER/3
, NAME = 'Coupler3'
, JOINTS = 8, 3
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 360., -108.


!======================================== Coupler ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='Coupler4'
COUPLER/4
, NAME = 'Coupler4'
, JOINTS = 9, 5
, TYPE = R : R
, SCALES = 360., -108.


!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q1_motion'
EXPRESSION / 1
, NAME = 'q1_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*3\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q2_motion'
EXPRESSION / 2
, NAME = 'q2_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q3_motion'
EXPRESSION / 3
, NAME = 'q3_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.5\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== Expression ========================================
!
!                         RecurDyn_Data_Name='q4_motion'
EXPRESSION / 4
, NAME = 'q4_motion'
, FUNCTION = sin(PI*time*2)*0.5\
, OUTPUT = TRUE
 
 
!======================================== UNIT ========================================
!
UNITS / 
, FORCE = Newton
, FORCE_SYMBOL = 'N'
, MASS = Kilogram
, MASS_SYMBOL = 'kg'
, LENGTH = Meter
, LENGTH_SYMBOL = 'm'
, TIME = Second
, TIME_SYMBOL = 's'


!======================================== GRAVITY ========================================
!
accgrav /  IGRAV = 0
, JGRAV = -9.80665
, KGRAV = 0


!======================================== OUTPUT ========================================
!
OUTPUT/GRSAVE
, RPLTSAVE = TRUE
, RADSAVE = TRUE
, REQSAVE = TRUE
, OUTSAVE = TRUE
, MSGSAVE = TRUE
, RANSAVE = TRUE
, RPMXSAVE = TRUE
, MCKSAVE = TRUE
, MODELVERIFICATIONMSG = FALSE
, JOINTINFORMATIONMSG = FALSE
, CONSTRAINTINFORMATIONMSG = FALSE
, REDUNDANTCONSTRAINTMSG = TRUE
, INDEPENDENTCOORDINATEMSG = FALSE
, SOLVERINFORMATIONMSG = TRUE
, ANALYSISINFORMATIONMSG = TRUE
, INTEGRATORINFORMATIONMSG = TRUE
, CONSTRAINTVIOLATIONMSG = FALSE
, ANALYSISPROCESSMSG = TRUE
, STPMSG = TRUE
, STEP_PLOT_FACTOR = 1
, MATCH_ENDTIME = TRUE
, SETTIMEOFFSETTOICFTIME
, KEEPICFPLOTSTEP = RECENT


!======================================= INTPAR =======================================
!
INTPAR / ADVHYBRID
, KMAX = 2
, HMAX = 0.01
, INITIAL_H = 1e-06
, ERROR = 0.005
, SPARSE = FALSE
, NDAMPING = 1
, TRKJACFACTOR = 100
, INTERPOLATE_H


!===================================== EQUILIBRIUM =====================================
!
EQUILIBRIUM /
, ERROR = 0.001
, MAXIT = 100
, INITIALSTEPSIZE = 1e-05
, HMAX = 1
, STEPSIZEFACTOR = 2
, ANIMATIONFLAG = 0
, TYPE = 2


!===================================== SOLVEROPTION ======================================
!
SOLVEROPTION /
, SIMULATIONSTATUS
, TIMEOFFSET = 0.000000
, TOLERANCEIF = 1e-08
, CHECKREDUNDANT = EVERYSTEP
, INITIALVELOCITY = RELATIVE
, STOPBYREDUNDANT = FALSE
, MODIFIED_INTEGRATOR_FAILURE = TRUE
, GR_LIMIT_ANGLE_DEGREE = 30
, BUSHINGROTATION = QUATERNION
, MAXIMUMCONVERGENCECOUNT = 10
, RFLEXMASSINV = FULL
, RFLEXEVJ_CHECKREDUN = ONCE
, MSGOUTFACTOR = 100
, IMPROVEMENTPREANALYSISACCURACY = TRUE
, FILLZEROFORBLANKINCONFILE  = 0
, NUM_THREAD = Auto
, SOLVERTYPENFLEX = DMFS
, SETLINEARSOLVERFORMBD = AUTO
, PLOT_GLOBAL_FLAG_CONGEOPRI = FALSE
, ADVANCED_MSSF = TRUE


!==================================== Stop by Condition ====================================
!
STOPBYCONDITION /
, E1 = 0.0\
, ACTIVEFLAG = FALSE


!===================================== INFO ======================================
!
INFO /
, MODEL_NAME = 'WOR'
, CURRENT_SYSTEM_NAME = 'WOR'


END
END
